description: Tracks Anaconda golden base image sha256 digests in Dockerfiles.
Add to your renovate.json extends list: "github>anaconda/renovate-config:golden-images"
Consumer repos scaffolded from anaconda/golden-templates include this preset automatically.

customManagers.description: Update sha256 digest pins for golden base images from ECR 811078382625.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/golden/

_note_ecr_auth: ECR authentication is handled by the Renovate bot's IAM role at the org level. No hostRules are needed in this preset. If the bot cannot authenticate to ECR 811078382625.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com via IAM, add hostRules following the pattern in other ECR-aware presets in this repo.
